description: STOP RUN inside PERFORMed paragraph: IBM terminates immediately, engine continues.
notes: IBM gap: STOP RUN inside a PERFORMed paragraph should terminate the program immediately, leaving WS-FLAG='INSID'. Engine emits STOP RUN as 'return' from the paragraph function, not sys.exit(), so execution continues in the caller. MOVE 'AFTER' executes, giving WS-FLAG='AFTER'. IBM would produce 'INSID'.
